title: TUI: dim/collapsible thought blocks + fix alignSelf height-measurement breaking transcript layout and scroll

AC1.note: src/capability/tui-layout.test.ts bans alignSelf in src/tui/** runtime sources; green (was RED with the six sites listed)

AC2.note: tui-shell.test.ts 'AC2: a bordered transcript box keeps its natural height even when the transcript overflows' — both echo boxes measure 3 rows with a 30-line block expanded

AC3.note: tui-shell.test.ts 'AC3: an expanded block reports its real height' — summed child heights >= 32, scrollHeight >= summed, MARKER-AFTER-BLOCK visible after scrolling to bottom

AC4.note: tui-shell.test.ts AC4 — captured spans: reasoning body carries TextAttributes.DIM, tool output body does not

AC5.note: tui-shell.test.ts AC5 — body clipped at MAX_THOUGHT_LINES=12 with the 'more lines not shown' notice; registry.bodyText and nav.copy still return line 60

AC6.note: tui-shell.test.ts AC6 — nav.toggleNewest('thought') expands then collapses; expanded header shows '/think collapse · y copy'; /think and /expand call it in tui-shell.ts

AC7.note: tsc --noEmit clean; keryx health run --changed PASS (score 93). bun test: 2095 pass, 1 fail = scripts/install-global.test.ts beforeEach timeout, reproduced identically on stashed main, unrelated to TUI

AC8.note: memory/lessons/tui-alignself-height-collapse.md (accepted, indexed) + flow-109 plan R4 marked SUPERSEDED + OpenTUI specification layout invariant
